arts.ttl: Former Manchester United coach Mike Phelan off to Wayne Rooney’s Plymouth
arts.sum: Veteran coach reunited with former Old Trafford star Argyle languishing in 22nd place in Championship The Plymouth manager Wayne Rooney has drafted in the former Manchester United coach Mike Phelan as he attempts to drag the club out of the Championship relegation zone. The 62-year-old, who spent nine years coaching at Old Trafford in two spells, the first of them under Sir Alex Ferguson, has been appointed as the assistant head coach following the departure of Pete Shuttleworth. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney recruits Man Utd ally as he bids to rescue Plymouth's season
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney's Plymouth Argyle dropped into the Championship's relegation places over the weekend and the former Manchester United star has brought a familiar face on board

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney appoints former Man United assistant as his new No 2 at Plymouth... as Red Devils legend fights to save his job amid a dismal run of form
arts.sum: Former Manchester United assistant manager Mike Phelan has become Wayne Rooney's new assistant at Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Rooney appoints Phelan as Plymouth assistant
arts.sum: Former Manchester United assistant manager Mike Phelan is appointed as Wayne Rooney's new assistant head coach at Plymouth Argyle.
